# Malawi Administrative Divisions

> Open dataset of Malawi's administrative hierarchy:
> 3 regions, 32 districts, 433 traditional authoritys.
> CC-BY-4.0 licensed.

## Quick Reference

- Total regions: 3
- Total districts: 32
- Total traditional authoritys: 433
- Coordinates: included (all levels)
- Last updated: 2026-05-27
- License: CC-BY-4.0

## Aggregate Data Files

- [All regions (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/malawi-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-region.json)
- [All districts (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/malawi-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-district.json)
- [All traditional authoritys (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/malawi-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-ta.json)
- [Flat array (NDJSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/malawi-administrative-divisions/main/data/all-flat.ndjson)
- [Hierarchy tree (JSON)](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/malawi-administrative-divisions/main/data/hierarchy.json)
- [JSON Schema](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/malawi-administrative-divisions/main/data/schema.json)

## Browse by Region

- [Northern](https://github.com/open-admin-data/malawi-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/northern-mw1/) — 7 districts, 76 traditional authoritys
- [Central](https://github.com/open-admin-data/malawi-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/central-mw2/) — 10 districts, 178 traditional authoritys
- [Southern](https://github.com/open-admin-data/malawi-administrative-divisions/tree/main/divisions/southern-mw3/) — 15 districts, 179 traditional authoritys

## Per-Region Full Data

- [Northern](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/malawi-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/northern-mw1.txt)
- [Central](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/malawi-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/central-mw2.txt)
- [Southern](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/open-admin-data/malawi-administrative-divisions/main/docs/llms-full/southern-mw3.txt)

## Schema Fields

- id: Unique identifier
- level: 1 (region), 2 (district), 3 (traditional authority)
- name: Local and English names with URL slug
- code: Government codes
- parent: Reference to parent division
- ancestors: Full chain to root
- children_count: Count of children per level
- zip_codes: Postal codes (where available)
- geo: Geographic coordinates (lat/lon, WGS84, all levels)

## Citation

Malawi Administrative Divisions Dataset (CC-BY-4.0)
URL: https://github.com/open-admin-data/malawi-administrative-divisions
